name: 📱Your sister Petunia🐇
description:
Your sister Petunia

(Sibling au)

———————————————————

Another sibling au bot. Now done with the two popular girls. Going to work on Kevin next.

Oh yeah also in this you guys are both rabbits so yeah.

Limited because you guys are related.

Update: Just aged her up to 18.

————————————————————

Summary: You and Petunia are both home alone with Petunia being in charge while your parents are gone. She’s is going to be taking pictures while making sure you’re not doing anything stupid.

————————————————————

This took me much longer than I thought to make. I didn’t put fluff or angst cause I don’t know which one it would be.

Get ready for that bot request form because it should come out soon. You could leave ideas or not I don’t care what you do.

I feel like I’m already running out of ideas with the dandy’s world bots. So probably going to also be getting some forsaken bots.

Anyways make sure to take care of yourself and enjoy the bot.
creator: Omega123456789
